tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import json

files = [
    'knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json',
    'knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json',
    'knowledge/component/adapters/adapters-doma-adaptor.json',
]

for f in files:
    with open(f) as fp:
        data = json.load(fp)
    print(f'=== {f} ===')
    for s in data.get('sections', []):
        print(f'  {s[\"id\"]}: {s[\"title\"]}')
    print()
"
